title: 2023 DPA Malaysia total compensation
summary: Median annual total compensation for designers in Malaysia was RM83,000, based on 46 respondents. Medium confidence for Junior to Senior IC levels; Malaysia has the second-highest respondent count in the survey but trails Singapore significantly, limiting analysis at senior and leadership levels.
methodology: Self-reported annual total compensation figures in local currency (MYR), including base salary, annual bonus, annual stock grants, and other compensation. Figures are self-reported and have not been independently verified.
